Event: Way of the Turtle
Event Date: 01/06/2020
Sage Bot Item Code: B21


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Turtle's Swiftness Bow

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of dealing 75-90% damage to a group of enemies.

Once in a while, curses 3 random enemies, deals 10000 damage to them, and reduces their incoming healing by 30% for 3 sec. If the cursed enemies have taken 100000 damage over 3 sec, the bow is upgraded.
Each upgrade restores the bow wielder's health by 15000 and enhances their damage by 20%. Max number of upgrades: 3.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
